steps: Submit formal reclaim request to MUFG Custody for JPY 119,850 overpayment on Nintendo Co Ltd dividend
Provide CLIENT07's Norwegian tax residency certificate and JP-NO treaty documentation supporting 10% withholding rate
Reference account 2401234567 and ISIN JP3902900004 with calculation showing correct net should be JPY 10,786,500
Request MUFG process recovery through Japanese tax authorities if standard reclaim procedures fail

references.title: Japanese National Tax Agency – Tax Treaties
